# GitHub Actions Conventions

Conventions for `.github/workflows/` only.

<!-- BEGIN_TABLE: generated by scripts/generate-conventions-index.py, edits inside will be overwritten -->

| Convention | File |
| --- | --- |
| Always pin third-party GitHub Actions to a full 40-char commit SHA with the version as a trailing comment — never use `@v1` / `@main` / `@master`, which can move to malicious code on a tag retag. | [pin-actions-to-commit-hash](../conventions/github-actions/pin-actions-to-commit-hash.md) |

<!-- END_TABLE -->
